economic_notes: Government business partnerships include Asabanaka Drill Services LP (drill services in far north Ontario), Asabanaka Drill Services Corporation (GP), and Wechimachida-Penn-Co Joint Venture (construction of Emily Anderson Memorial Menoyawin Health Centre and teacherage). Consolidated subsidiaries include Petrokas Ltd., Kasabonika Lake Construction Ltd., Kasabonika Community Development Corporation, Wechimachida Construction Services (GP) Corporation, and Wechimachida Construction Limited Partnership.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 but audit signed September 15, 2021 — significant delay. Large deferred revenue of $23.26M primarily related to New School construction funded by ISC ($22.36M deferred). Net debt position of -$7.55M. Three government business partnerships accounted for under modified equity method. Five subsidiaries fully consolidated. Long-term debt schedule appears truncated in source document. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $38,282,434 + Government of Ontario $4,062,899 + CMHC $456,213 = $42,801,546; OFNLP $1,304,711 added if treated as government transfer brings total to $44,106,257 — used ISC + Ontario + CMHC only for government transfers and excluded OFNLP as it is classified separately.
